T0202.title: Basic Vehicle File
T0202.definition: Basic vehicle registration data containing only information like license plate number and vehicle model, traded on the black market.
T0202.description: Unlike full vehicle records, this data does not include the owner's personal identity information. Leaks often originate from vehicle administration offices or insurance systems. Underground actors use it for license plate cloning, evading traffic penalties, or as a stepping stone to acquire more detailed owner information. Its lower acquisition cost leads to higher circulation volumes in the market.
